requires_subpages.reason: All relevant bygglov data is rendered inline on the listing page within li.sv-channel-item inside div#Bygglov. No subpages needed for core fields.

notes: Bygglov items are fully inline. Each li contains: beskrivning (sv-font-anslag-organ), fastighetsbeteckning, diarienummer, beslutsdatum, and förvaringsplats — all as consecutive span.sv-font-anslag-text elements. Text must be parsed with regex/split since fields are label:value format within spans, not separate elements. No pagination observed. Section is under h2#h-Kungorelseavbygglov. Separate section 'Kungörelse' (div#Kungorelse) may also be relevant but was empty at time of scrape.
